notes: First session back on the Tonal. Started conservative to feel things out.
Bumped weights slightly across the board. Felt strong.
Good session. Shoulder press is the weakest link. Keeping lat pulldown at 45.
Chest press PR. Last rep was hard but clean.
Hit 50 on chest press. New milestone. Triceps were burning.
Great session. Everything moving in the right direction.
55 lbs on chest press. That is a real milestone. 8 weeks of steady work.
Starting Stage 1. Everything felt hard. Dead hang barely lasted 5 seconds.
Scapular pulls getting smoother. Hang is still rough. Bodyweight squats easy.
Good session overall. Was sick earlier this week so took this easy.
Hang is up to 8 seconds consistently. Incline rows feel solid. Progress.
Strong session despite bad day overall. The workout was the best part of the day.
